# Follow-up issue drafts for #7370

These issue drafts split the Mintlify readability gaps by seam so each can be worked independently:

1. `01-add-llms-txt-and-agent-crawl-entrypoints.md` (discovery seam)
2. `02-publish-machine-readable-docs-index.md` (navigation seam)
3. `03-add-agent-summaries-to-doc-pages.md` (content seam)
4. `04-publish-machine-readable-api-reference.md` (API reference seam)
